name: Nike Soccer Camp at Brookfield Sports Complex -  (June 15–19, 2026)
description: Soccer Skill Schools was voted a Top-10 Nike Soccer Camp in 2024 & 2025 by players and parents! Join us for the Nike Soccer Camp at Brookfield Sports Complex with Kyle Jones, Director of Soccer Skill Schools. This camp welcomes players of all abilities, ages 6-16, to develop and refine their technical skills in a dynamic, competitive environment. It's an exceptional opportunity for any player to train under top coaching professionals while having fun and pushing their game to the next level! Soccer Skill Schools' "Numbers Approach Methodology" brings world-class skill development methods from Brazil, Holland, England, and Spain directly to the Midwest. The Soccer Skill School approach focuses on the individual player by guiding each athlete toward complete mastery of the ball, empowering them to make their own creative decisions, and equipping them with 65+ individual skills to win the one-on-one competitions that determine every game's outcome. Led by experienced college coaches and current college players, the Soccer Skill Schools staff brings elite-level expertise and mentorship to every session. Training alongside coaches who compete at the collegiate level gives players invaluable insight into what it takes to elevate their game and succeed at the next level! Hear from Coach Kyle Jones: “We create an environment where players are challenged, supported, and inspired every day. Through high-quality coaching and a love for the game, our goal is to help each athlete build confidence, develop their skills, and leave camp better both on and off the field.”

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Oregon State University -  (July 5–9, 2026)
description: Join us for the Nike Soccer Camp at Oregon State University in Corvallis, Oregon, an immersive overnight soccer camp that has sold out three consecutive years. Set on the beautiful Oregon State campus, this premier residential camp offers the complete college-style experience, combining elite soccer training with engaging off-the-field and social activities. Designed for boys and girls ages 6–17, this co-ed Nike Soccer Camp is led by passionate, experienced coaches committed to helping players accelerate their development. Campers train daily using a blend of modern and traditional coaching methods, focusing on technical skill development, tactical understanding, and confident decision-making in game-like situations. The overnight format allows athletes to fully experience campus life, build friendships, and participate in structured evening activities that complement their soccer training. This balance of high-level coaching and a truly immersive residential experience creates an environment where players grow both as athletes and as individuals. Whether your goal is to improve technical ability, boost soccer IQ, or experience what it’s like to train in a top-tier college soccer environment, the Nike Soccer Camp at Oregon State University delivers a fun, competitive, and unforgettable summer camp experience.

name: Nike Soccer Camp with Player ONE Performance - UC Santa Cruz -  (June 21–25, 2026)
description: Voted the #1 Nike Soccer Camp Director by parents and campers in 2025! (Top-10 in 2023/2024) Designed for coed players ages 9–18, this premier summer camp blends high‑level soccer training with an immersive overnight experience at UC Santa Cruz, creating unmatched development both on and off the field. Hosted at one of Northern California’s most scenic university settings, campers enjoy access to top‑tier soccer facilities, modern residential housing, and outstanding campus amenities. With camp weeks selling out for the past four consecutive summers, demand is high for this unforgettable soccer experience. Player ONE Performance, Northern California’s premier club‑neutral training program since 2017, brings a proven, player‑focused approach built on elite training standards, energy, and attention to detail. Campers train through a professionally crafted curriculum with an intensive focus on technique, intelligent movement, goal‑scoring, game intelligence, and mental preparation. This comprehensive approach gives every player the tools, confidence, and clarity they need to leave camp feeling sharper and more prepared. Whether players are looking to elevate their game, gain confidence, or compete alongside motivated peers, this overnight Nike Soccer Camp at UC Santa Cruz offers a summer experience that is as impactful as it is memorable.

name: Nike Girls Soccer Camp Southeastern University -  (May 31–June 4, 2026)
description: Join us for the Nike Girls Soccer Camp at Southeastern University, where players train in a true collegiate environment designed to inspire growth, confidence, and a deeper love for the game. Hosted on Southeastern’s campus and led by the university’s Women’s and Men’s Soccer coaching staffs, this camp offers athletes the opportunity to experience what it’s like to train within a college soccer program. The curriculum blends technical and tactical training with daily gameplay, allowing players to apply new skills in game‑like situations. Sessions are designed to challenge, inspire, and motivate campers while maintaining a fun, competitive atmosphere. Players leave camp with improved skills, greater soccer IQ, and the inspiration to continue developing their game long after the summer ends, all while building friendships and memories that last a lifetime. The Nike Girls Soccer Camp at Southeastern University delivers a meaningful college‑style training experience that helps players grow on and off the field, equipping them with skills, motivation, and memories that carry well beyond the summer.

name: Nike Girls Soccer Camp at McDaniel College - Player Development (July 16–19, 2026)
description: The Nike Girls Soccer Camp at McDaniel College in Westminster, Maryland offers an exceptional summer soccer experience set on a picturesque and welcoming collegiate campus. A three‑time sellout, this highly regarded camp provides young female athletes with the opportunity to train, compete, and live like college players in an environment designed to inspire growth, confidence, and independence. Campers benefit from daily training sessions on McDaniel’s excellent athletic facilities while experiencing college life through extended‑day and overnight options. The overnight experience allows players to fully immerse themselves in the collegiate setting, living in residence halls, participating in structured evening activities, and forming meaningful connections with teammates both on and off the field. The camp is led by Camp Director Sandy Lagana Bly, a respected leader in youth development, former collegiate head coach, and current Associate Director of Athletics at McDaniel College. Alongside Women’s Head Coach Michael Scott, the program features a seasoned staff of collegiate coaches, creating one of the strongest camp coaching lineups in the region. This elite staff delivers high‑quality technical and tactical instruction rooted in collegiate standards, while providing campers with an unmatched college soccer and student‑athlete experience. Designed for players of all experience levels, this girls‑only camp blends competitive training with a positive, empowering atmosphere that encourages leadership, resilience, and self‑belief. With its outstanding facilities, supportive coaching, and true college‑style immersion, the Nike Girls Soccer Camp at McDaniel College continues to be a summer highlight, creating lasting memories while helping players prepare for their next level, both in soccer and in life. “Our camp provides a personal experience for every camper. Our coaches and counselors work hard to connect with each player and create an environment where learning and fun go hand in hand. Older players also have the opportunity to expand their soccer knowledge by learning directly from college coaches as they prepare for their upcoming high school season.” — Sandy Lagana Bly, Camp Director & Associate Athletic Director, McDaniel College

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Seattle University - All Skills (June 15–19, 2026)
description: Rich Schreiner was voted a Top-10 Nike Soccer Camp Director in 2025 by players and parents! Nike Soccer Camp at Seattle University offers players of all ages and abilities the opportunity to learn new skills, build passion for the game and take their performance to the next level. Players and Coaches of the Men's and Women's Soccer Team, Julie Woodward and Richard Schreiner, are excited to host camps this summer on the beautiful campus of Seattle University! Get the full camp experience and have fun while building the core fundamentals integrated within Nike Soccer Camps. Make friends and create memories with our team that will last a lifetime! Campers are trained by the Seattle University Men's & Women's Soccer coaches and team. Come experience what it’s like to be a part of the Redhawk Soccer Family!

Located at Moorestown High School in Moorestown, NJ, this camp offers the perfect blend of training and gameplay. The focus at camp will be on player development, each camper will refine their technique, learn new skills, compete in games and drills, have fun, and make new friends. This youth soccer camp provides the perfect blend of instruction and fun! Make friends and create memories with our team that will last a lifetime! Sure to be a summer highlight, these camps offer a unique opportunity for aspiring soccer players aged 5-16. Throughout the week campers learn new skills, perfect techniques, increase game knowledge, make new friends and have fun playing soccer!

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Furman University -  (June 22–26, 2026)
description: Recognized as a Top-10 Rated Director Awards recipient, the Nike Soccer Camp at Furman University is consistently regarded as one of the premier youth soccer camps in the region and a trusted favorite among families year after year. Set on the beautiful Furman University campus, campers train in an inspiring collegiate environment led by Head Coach Andrew Burr and his experienced coaching staff. With a strong tradition of excellence, the staff brings a high level of expertise, energy, and care to every session. Open to boys and girls ages 4–14 of all skill levels, campers are grouped by age and ability to ensure the right balance of challenge and support. The curriculum blends high-quality instruction with a fun, engaging atmosphere, helping players develop their skills, confidence, and love for the game Hear from Head Coach Andrew Burr: "Our coaches are high-energy and excited about creating a fun environment where campers will develop a love for soccer, and enjoy participating with passionate coaches and new friends. In addition to developing soccer players, we enjoy pouring into the kids with an emphasis on teamwork and how to treat others. Our staff consists of highly qualified coaches, but we also have members of our staff who are local school principals, teachers, and college professors. It makes for a well-rounded group that has expertise in working with children. This makes all aspects of the camp, from registration and check-in process, making the campers feel safe and comfortable, and emphasizing life skills."

name: Nike Soccer Camp in West Seattle - All Skills I (June 22–26, 2026)
description: Rich Schreiner was voted a Top-10 Nike Soccer Camp Director in 2025 by players and parents! Join us for an exciting opportunity to elevate your game at the Nike Soccer Camp in West Seattle.. Supervised by the experienced coaching staff and players of Seattle University, this camp offers young soccer enthusiasts the chance to sharpen their skills in a dynamic, inclusive environment. Whether you're looking to improve technical abilities, tactical understanding, or team coordination, you'll be guided by passionate coaches in one of Seattle's most vibrant communities. Don't miss this chance to train like a pro, learn from the best, and enjoy the beautiful Pacific Northwest surroundings. This camp was held at Georgetown Playfield in 2023 but returned to Delridge Playfield in 2024 and 2025. This summer, we are offering three weeks at Del Ridge and one week at Hiawatha Playfield (July 13-17)

name: San Francisco Soccer Camp - Youth Academy I (June 8–12, 2026)
description: San Francisco Soccer Camp powered by Nike Soccer Camps, was voted as a Top-10 Nike Soccer Camp by parents in 2025(Top Camp in 2024)! Join us for an amazing week of camp at San Francisco Soccer Camp. Team up with Camp Director and 2023 Pac-12 Coach of the Year Leonard Griffin for the ultimate soccer training camp! San Francisco Soccer Camp (SFSC) offers so much more than your average soccer camp for players of all ability levels! Camps are led by a College Coaching Staff and additional support from elite college players to bring the camper-to-coach ratio down. A note from Leonard Griffin, Head Coach, CAL Men's Soccer: "At the heart of our camp is the belief that high character leads to high performance. As a player, I saw firsthand how the most successful teams — both in college and professionally — were built on strong values, discipline, and teamwork. As a college coach, I’ve carried that lesson into every team I’ve led. That’s why, when we brought the Cal Men’s Soccer experience to San Francisco Soccer Camp, we knew character development had to be embedded into our program.But it’s not just about building strong individuals; it’s also about ensuring that the game remains fun. Just like with our college players, we make it a priority that every camper understands the joy of soccer. Too often, we see young athletes losing sight of why they fell in love with the game in the first place. At San Francisco Soccer Camp, we create a space where players can work hard, grow technically, and most importantly — have fun. It’s that balance of passion, skill, character, and joy that makes our camp so unique."

name: Nike Boys Soccer Camp at University of Portland -  (June 15–18, 2026)
description: Nike Boys Soccer Camp at University of Portland was voted a top 10 Nike Soccer Camp in 2025 by players and parents! Nike Boys Soccer Camp at University of Portland provides exceptional coaching and a welcoming atmosphere that helps players of all levels grow. With engaging drills, supportive instructors, and a strong emphasis on teamwork, it creates an exciting environment where kids can build confidence, improve their skills, and have a great time on the field. Join us this summer for the Nike Soccer Camp at the University of Portland, led by the U. of Portland Men's coaching staff! Offering youth day camps and collegiate experience residential camps. Designed for dedicated young players, the youth day camps blend traditional and modern coaching techniques to maximize skill development. Train with top coaches and players in a competitive yet supportive environment, gaining advanced technical skills, tactical awareness, and a deeper passion for the game. Don't miss this chance to elevate your game and take the next step in your soccer journey!

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Ohio Wesleyan University -  (June 22–25, 2026)
description: 2024 Top-10 Rated Director Awards recipient! Join us for an amazing week of summer camp at Nike Soccer Camp at Ohio Wesleyan University. Team up with Camp Director and Head Women's Soccer Coach Patrick Ferguson for the ultimate soccer training camp! With a mix of traditional and modern soccer coaching methodologies, the curriculum is one that allows every camper the opportunity to continue to progress to a higher level of soccer play. Camp is open to players of all skill levels between the ages of 6-14. Don't miss an exciting opportunity to train with a collegiate coaching staff and players in Delaware County, Ohio! Hear from Camp Director Pat Ferguson: "At camp we will focus on three areas: fun, technique training & skill instruction. Players learn best when having fun and executing technique and skill within the context of play."

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Marquette University -  (June 22–26, 2026)
description: Take your game to the next level this summer at the Nike Soccer Camp at Marquette University in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Open to players of all abilities, this camp offers a unique opportunity to train with Head Coach David Korn, a Top-10 Rated Nike Soccer Camp Director, along with Marquette University coaches and players, at Valley Fields, home of the Marquette Golden Eagles. Our staff is dedicated to helping each athlete grow in skill, confidence, character, and love for the game. Training sessions are designed to challenge experienced players while also supporting newer athletes through a strong foundation of ball skills and game understanding. Campers are grouped by age and ability to ensure the right level of development for every player. The curriculum blends technical training and tactical instruction with small-sided games and competitive scenarios that reinforce teamwork, decision-making, and overall game awareness. Beyond skill development, we emphasize character, leadership, and what it means to be a great teammate. This youth soccer camp in Milwaukee provides the perfect balance of high-level coaching and fun, giving players the chance to improve, compete, make friends, and create lasting summer memories. Hear from Men's Head Coach & Camp Director, David Korn: "Our staff is dedicated to helping each athlete progress to the next level of their game while growing in confidence, character, and love for the sport."

name: Nike Soccer Camp at University of Wisconsin - Parkside -  (June 15–18, 2026)
address: UW-Parkside Sports & Activity Center - 4130 Petrifying Springs Rd
description: Give your young athlete an unforgettable week of soccer development and fun this summer at the Nike Soccer Camp at UW‑Parkside! Open to boys and girls ages 6–14, this coed camp is designed for all skill levels, whether your child is brand‑new to the game or looking to take their skills to the next level. Led by Head Women’s Coach Brittany Nikolic and Head Men’s Coach Jason Zitzke, campers will train with UW‑Parkside’s top‑tier coaching staff and college players, known for their energy, expertise, and passion for helping young athletes grow. Hosted on the beautiful UW‑Parkside campus, this camp delivers the perfect blend of high‑level instruction, age‑appropriate challenges, and nonstop fun. Players will sharpen their technique, build confidence, and enjoy an inspiring environment where teamwork, encouragement, and love for the game come first. If your child wants to improve their soccer skills, make new friends, or enjoy an exciting week outdoors, the Nike Soccer Camp at UW‑Parkside offers an incredible experience from the opening whistle to the final celebration. Hear from Head Coach Brittany Nikolic: "Our coaching staff is made up of current college coaches and college players. We love to teach technique and game concepts so the kids build confidence and in turn have a great time. We strongly believe in teamwork and respect and know that through sport these kids are developing important life skills."

name: Nike Boys Soccer Camp Sacred Heart University -  (June 21–24, 2026)
description: Join us at Sacred Heart University in Fairfield, Connecticut for an intensive week of boys soccer training designed to challenge, inspire, and elevate players of all skill levels. Beyond the field, campers build lasting friendships, enjoy a fun and positive atmosphere, and experience the excitement of training alongside dedicated players who share their passion for soccer. Whether your goal is to sharpen your skills, prepare for the upcoming season, or simply enjoy a week of high-quality soccer training, the Sacred Heart University Boys Soccer Camp offers the perfect blend of development, competition, and summer fun.

description: Take your game to the next level this summer at the Nike Girls Soccer Camp at Northern Illinois University in DeKalb, Illinois. Each session is designed to help players elevate their technical and tactical skills while building confidence and understanding of the next level. name: Nike Soccer Camp at Benedictine University -  (June 19–21, 2026)
description: Coach Dave DiTomasso has partnered with Spencer Pappas, Head Men’s Soccer Coach at Benedictine University, to offer an exceptional collegiate overnight camp experience at Benedictine University this summer. Now hosted on the Benedictine University campus, this camp provides players with a true college soccer environment—training on quality facilities and experiencing life in a collegiate setting. Please note, this camp was formerly held at Elmhurst University with Coach DiTomasso and has been regarded as one of the premier soccer camps in the region for decades. Designed for aspiring players, this camp is an outstanding opportunity to strengthen fundamentals and elevate overall performance. Instruction emphasizes functional training, attacking and supporting play, decision-making, finishing, defending, small-sided games, 11v11 play, and creativity. Dedicated goalkeeper training is also provided, ensuring every player receives position-specific development. With a fully immersive overnight experience, campers gain a valuable introduction to college life, staying in residence halls, training daily in a structured collegiate environment, and building connections with players from across the region. This experience is ideal for young athletes looking to understand what it takes to compete and succeed at the next level. Open to players ages 8–18, with overnight eligibility beginning at age 9 (8-year-olds are welcome as extended day campers). Coach DiTomasso’s camp was also recognized as one of North America’s Top 60 Summer Camps of 2017 by FlightNetwork travel agency, highlighting its long-standing reputation for quality instruction and player development.

name: Mount Soccer Academy Collegiate Experience Camp -  (July 23–26, 2026)
description: Step into the world of Division I soccer at the Mount Soccer Academy Collegiate Experience Camp at Mount St. Mary’s University in Emmitsburg, Maryland. Hosted on the University’s stunning collegiate campus, this highly sought‑after overnight camp has sold out for four consecutive years, offering aspiring players an exclusive opportunity to experience life inside a true Division I training environment. Led by Men’s Head Coach Brett Teach and his accomplished staff, campers train daily on Mount St. Mary’s outstanding athletic facilities in a setting shaped by decades of elite player development. Training sessions reflect the pace and intensity of the college game, blending modern and traditional coaching methods to sharpen technical skills, tactical awareness, and competitive mindset through structured training, small‑sided play, and match competition. The overnight format elevates the experience beyond the field, allowing athletes to live on campus, utilize collegiate facilities, and participate in structured evening activities that promote leadership, accountability, and independence. This residential immersion helps players understand the daily routines, expectations, and culture of a Division I program. Training and competition take place on Mount St. Mary’s well‑maintained collegiate fields, providing campers with a professional‑level environment that supports high‑performance development. Combined with access to campus amenities and a scenic, distraction‑free setting ideal for focused growth, the facilities play a central role in creating an authentic college soccer atmosphere. With elite instruction, Division I insight, exceptional facilities, and a proven track record of demand, the Mount Soccer Academy Collegiate Experience Camp delivers a complete and unforgettable collegiate soccer experience for players ready to take the next step.

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Endicott College - Overnight Camp (June 25–28, 2026)
description: Experience the Nike Soccer Camp at Endicott College in Beverly, Massachusetts, a premier summer soccer destination set on one of New England’s most scenic college campuses. Overlooking the Atlantic Ocean, Endicott offers outstanding athletic facilities and an ideal setting for an immersive overnight camp that blends high-level soccer training with the full college-residential experience. Designed for players looking to elevate their game in a focused yet supportive environment, the camp is led by Christine Silva, former Associate Head Coach at Endicott College, alongside a highly qualified coaching staff. Campers train daily using a thoughtful mix of modern and traditional coaching principles, with sessions emphasizing technical proficiency, tactical awareness, and confident execution in competitive game-based scenarios. The highlight of the program is the Girls Overnight Camp, where athletes live on campus, train extensively on Endicott’s top-tier fields, and participate in structured evening activities that enhance team bonding and personal growth. This overnight format allows players to fully immerse themselves in campus life, build lasting friendships, and develop independence, mirroring the rhythm and expectations of collegiate soccer. In addition, the Coed Day Camp provides a high-energy training option for boys and girls seeking elite instruction without the overnight stay, making it a great fit for younger athletes or local players. Across both camp options, athletes will develop their skills, raise their soccer IQ, and enjoy a week filled with competition, learning, and unforgettable moments. Whether you’re aiming to sharpen your fundamentals or experience what it’s like to train in a true college environment, the Nike Soccer Camp at Endicott College delivers a dynamic and memorable summer soccer experience. “As a player, it was always the people and the experience that made camp special. That’s why our camp is built with a passion for the game and a focus on player development, helping athletes grow their skills, confidence, and a lasting love for the game in a positive, supportive environment.” — Christine Silva, Camp Director and Former Women’s Associate Head Coach, Endicott College

name: Nike Boys Soccer College ID Camp in Bozeman - College ID Camp (July 23–26, 2026)
description: The Nike College ID Soccer Camp is held on the stunning campus of Montana State University in Bozeman, MT, one of the most picturesque college environments in the country. Surrounded by mountains and wide-open landscapes, the campus offers an inspiring setting for players to train, compete, and elevate their game. With access to high-quality university athletic facilities and well-maintained fields, campers experience a true collegiate training atmosphere. This camp, the first of its kind in the region, is designed to be a gateway for aspiring male college athletes in the mountain region and beyond. The camp staff features a diverse group of collegiate coaches from across the United States, providing players with valuable exposure to a variety of coaching styles and insight into the college recruiting process. With both overnight and day camp options, field players and goalkeepers alike can find the ideal training experience for their individual needs. Overnight campers enjoy a full residential experience, staying in campus housing and getting a firsthand look at what it’s like to live and train as a college athlete, building independence, friendships, and lasting memories. Combined with top-class coaching, facilities, and athletic training support, each player benefits from both individual and team instruction designed to accelerate development. This is an incredible opportunity for players from across the country to come together in a unique and inspiring setting, train with top collegiate coaches, and gain a deeper understanding of what it takes to compete at the next level. A perfect camp experience for any player looking to learn what it takes to play at the college level. We look forward to helping you become the best soccer player possible.

description: Train this summer at the Nike Soccer Camp hosted on the stunning campus of the University of Nevada, Las Vegas, where players experience a full‑scale soccer immersion in one of the most dynamic settings in the country. Taking advantage of UNLV’s outstanding athletic facilities, this coed camp provides an unforgettable overnight experience for ages 10–16, along with a high‑energy day camp option for ages 6–9. Overnight campers live on campus in gender‑segregated residence halls, creating a safe, engaging environment that balances independence, structure, and fun. Powered by JM Soccer Academy and led by former professional player and highly respected youth development coach Jordan Murrell, the camp delivers elite instruction in a purpose‑built training environment. Players train daily on top‑tier collegiate fields and facilities while progressing through a comprehensive curriculum that emphasizes technical development, position‑specific training, competitive play, and soccer IQ. The coaching staff is dedicated to creating a challenging yet supportive setting that fosters confidence, creativity, and a deep understanding of the game. The experience extends well beyond the field, making this camp truly stand out. Campers take part in classroom sessions focused on leadership, mentality, nutrition, and game strategy, gaining tools that support both athletic and personal growth. Recovery sessions help players stay fresh throughout the week, while guest speakers provide inspiration and real‑world insight into the soccer pathway. Off the field, campers enjoy pool time, indoor futsal, and structured evening activities, designed to beat the Las Vegas heat while keeping athletes active, connected, and energized. Surrounded by world‑class facilities and the excitement of the UNLV campus, this overnight soccer camp offers young players a complete, memorable summer experience, combining elite youth coaching, outstanding amenities, and a vibrant residential setting that supports development on and off the pitch.

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Rider University -  (July 26–29, 2026)
description: Join us for an outstanding week at the Nike Soccer Camp at Rider University in Lawrence Township, New Jersey, hosted on Rider’s beautiful campus. Led by the experienced True Balance Sports Camps (TBSC) coaching staff, this camp offers players high‑quality instruction in a focused, supportive training environment. The curriculum blends traditional and modern coaching methodologies, helping players develop technical skills, tactical awareness, and confidence in game‑like situations. Sessions are designed to challenge and support athletes of all levels, providing each camper the opportunity to continue progressing to a higher level of play. Campers have the unique opportunity to live on campus, enjoying an immersive overnight camp experience while training daily at Rider University’s facilities. The program is open to outfield players and goalkeepers, with goalkeepers training alongside field players for all‑around development. Goalkeeper‑specific instruction is integrated through targeted pull‑out groups, training activities, and gameplay situations throughout the week. The Nike Soccer Camp at Rider University delivers a well‑rounded summer experience that combines quality coaching, structured training, and an engaging residential setting, helping players improve their game, build confidence, and create lasting memories.

name: Nike Soccer Camp with the French Football Federation - Mercy College -  (Aug. 2–6, 2026)
description: French Football Federation was voted a top 10 Nike Soccer Camp in 2025 by players and parents! name: Nike Soccer Camp in Norman Oklahoma -  (June 7–9, 2026)
description: Join us for an incredible camp experience at the Nike Soccer Camp at the University of Oklahoma in Norman, OK. Hosted on the OU campus, this camp gives players the opportunity to train in a true collegiate environment, utilizing top-tier athletic facilities and fields while experiencing the energy and tradition of a major Division I program. Team up with Camp Director and University of Oklahoma Women’s Soccer Head Coach Matt Mott and his staff for the ultimate soccer training experience. Led by Oklahoma coaches, the camp provides players with direct insight into the standards, training methods, and expectations of high-level college soccer. With a blend of traditional and modern coaching methodologies, the curriculum is designed to help every camper continue progressing to the next level of play. This is a fully residential overnight camp experience, with campers staying in campus housing and fully immersing themselves in life as a college athlete. From dorm living to training on campus fields, players gain a firsthand understanding of what it takes to compete at the collegiate level while building independence, friendships, and lasting summer memories. Sure to be a summer highlight, this camp offers a unique and exciting opportunity for aspiring soccer players ages 10–16 to train in a FUN, engaging, and collegiate-level setting. Throughout the week, campers will develop new skills, refine techniques, expand their game knowledge, and enjoy the game alongside players from across the region.

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Saint Johns Northwestern Academies -  (June 28–July 1, 2026)
description: Soccer Skill Schools was voted a Top-10 Nike Soccer Camp in 2024 & 2025 by players and parents! Join us this summer at Saint John’s Northwestern Academy, nestled in the scenic heart of Delafield, Wisconsin, for a soccer experience designed to elevate players of all levels. Set on a beautiful, historic campus, the academy features expansive, well-maintained fields and top-tier training spaces that create an ideal environment for player development, competition, and fun. Whether you are a beginner looking to build the fundamentals or an advanced player seeking to refine your techniques, the Nike Soccer Camp offers the perfect training setting. Directing the camp will be Kyle Jones, owner of Soccer Skill Schools, alongside his experienced coaching staff. This camp is open to boys and girls of all abilities, ages 9–18, and is designed to help each player develop and refine their skills and techniques. It’s an amazing opportunity for any player to learn from a top coaching professional, enjoy the game, and train in a positive, competitive atmosphere. Soccer Skill Schools' "Numbers Approach Methodology" brings world-class skill development methods from Brazil, Holland, England, and Spain directly to the Midwest. The Soccer Skill Schools approach focuses on the individual player by guiding each athlete toward complete mastery of the ball, empowering them to make their own creative decisions, and equipping them with 65+ individual skills to win the one-on-one competitions that determine every game's outcome. Led by experienced college coaches and current college players, the Soccer Skill Schools staff brings elite-level expertise and mentorship to every session. Training alongside coaches who compete at the collegiate level gives players invaluable insight into what it takes to elevate their game and succeed at the next level! Hear from Coach Kyle Jones: “We create an environment where players are challenged, supported, and inspired every day. Through high-quality coaching and a love for the game, our goal is to help each athlete build confidence, develop their skills, and leave camp better both on and off the field.”

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Westmont College - Santa Barbara - Overnight I (July 12–17, 2026)
description: Voted the #1 Nike Soccer Camp Director by parents and campers in 2025! (Top-10 in 2023/2024) Designed for coed players ages 9–18, this premier overnight Nike Soccer Camp at Westmont College delivers elite training paired with a fully immersive residential experience on California’s Central Coast. Hosted on Westmont’s scenic Santa Barbara campus, campers enjoy high‑quality soccer facilities, comfortable on‑campus housing, and top‑tier amenities that create an environment built for growth both on and off the field. With previous camp sessions selling out year after year, demand for this experience continues to be extremely high. This summer marks an exciting evolution, as two respected Nike Soccer Camp programs on the Central Coast have officially come together to form one enhanced experience at Westmont College. The former Nike Vogelsinger Soccer Academy and The Soccer Academy Camp (previously held at Cate School) are now unified under one vision, creating a stronger, more impactful camp for every player. The camp is led by Ben Maxwell of Player ONE Performance, Northern California’s premier club‑neutral training program since 2017 and the #1 Nike Soccer Camp Director in the U.S. (2026). Ben brings proven leadership and continuity from both programs, delivering a player‑focused training experience built on elite standards, high energy, and attention to detail. Campers follow a professionally designed curriculum emphasizing technical development, intelligent movement, goal‑scoring, game awareness, and mental preparation, leaving camp more confident, sharper, and ready to compete at the next level. Whether players are looking to elevate their performance, build confidence, or train alongside highly motivated peers, the overnight Nike Soccer Camp at Westmont College offers a summer experience that is both development‑driven and truly memorable.

Campers will take part in age-appropriate training sessions focused on dribbling, passing, shooting, ball control, and overall confidence on the field. Sessions are designed to be engaging and active, combining technical work with small-sided games that promote teamwork, communication, and sportsmanship. Led by Northern Illinois University Women’s Soccer Head Coach Michael O’Neill, the camp blends modern and traditional coaching methods to help every player progress at their own pace. Individual attention and small-group instruction ensure campers are supported throughout the week. A true summer highlight, this camp is open to players ages 6–14 and provides a fun, competitive environment where athletes can build skills, make friends, and grow their love for the game. Hear from NIU Head Coach and Camp Director Michael O'Neil: "Our camp is built around the belief that young players learn best when they feel supported, challenged, and excited to be on the field. Through positive coaching, fun and engaging activities, and age-appropriate skill development, players will build confidence, improve their soccer fundamentals, learn teamwork and sportsmanship, and develop a lasting love for the game in a safe and encouraging environment."

name: Marquette University Elite Boys Overnight Nike Soccer Camp -  (July 20–23, 2026)
description: The Marquette University Elite Boys Soccer Camp, held at the prestigious St. John’s Northwestern Academy, offers both overnight and commuter options and is designed to provide a fun, challenging, and competitive environment for ambitious soccer players ages 9–15. Campers receive direct instruction from Marquette University coaches and players, along with a select group of hand-picked staff. The camp features a blend of high-level training sessions and full-sided matches, allowing players to sharpen their skills and apply them in realistic game settings. A structured goalkeeper curriculum is also included. Our goal is for every camper to have a memorable experience alongside friends and teammates while competing against top youth talent from across the area and the Midwest. The state-of-the-art facilities at St. John’s Northwestern Academy provide the perfect backdrop for development, competition, and fun. At the core of our camp is a strong commitment to player development. Our staff is dedicated to helping each athlete progress to the next level of their game while growing in confidence, character, and love for the sport. We understand the investment families make and strive to deliver a high-quality, impactful camp experience. Giveaways, prizes, and awards will be earned throughout the week, and all campers receive a Marquette Soccer t-shirt.

name: Nike Soccer Camp in Whitefish Bay -  (July 13–17, 2026)
description: Take your game to the next level this summer at the Nike Soccer Camp in Whitefish Bay, Wisconsin, conveniently located near Glendale and the greater Milwaukee area. Open to players of all abilities, this camp offers a unique opportunity to train with Marquette University Head Coach David Korn, a Top 10 Nike Soccer Camp Director, along with his coaching staff and players in a high-energy, supportive environment. Our staff is dedicated to helping each athlete grow in skill, confidence, character, and love for the game. Training sessions are designed to challenge experienced players while also supporting newer athletes through a strong foundation of ball skills and game understanding. Campers are grouped by age and ability to ensure the right level of development for every player. The curriculum blends technical training and tactical instruction with small-sided games and competitive scenarios that reinforce teamwork, decision-making, and overall game awareness. Beyond skill development, we emphasize character, leadership, and what it means to be a great teammate. This youth soccer camp in Whitefish Bay, serving families in Glendale and the Milwaukee area, provides the perfect balance of high-level coaching and fun. Players will improve their skills, build confidence, make friends, and create lasting summer memories. Hear from Men's Head Coach & Camp Director, David Korn: "Our staff is dedicated to helping each athlete progress to the next level of their game while growing in confidence, character, and love for the sport."

name: Nike Girls Soccer Camp at Fairfield University -  (July 6–10, 2026)
description: Experience an unforgettable week of soccer development at the Nike Girls Soccer Camp at Fairfield University, one of Connecticut’s premier destinations for young athletes! Designed for girls ages 6–14, this camp takes place on Fairfield’s beautiful campus, featuring state‑of‑the‑art athletic facilities that create the perfect environment for learning, competing, and having fun. Led by Associate Head Women’s Soccer Coach Corey Holton, along with an outstanding staff of collegiate coaches, campers will train under some of the region’s most respected teachers of the game. Coach Holton and her staff bring years of NCAA coaching expertise, delivering a high‑energy, confidence‑building experience that empowers players at every level. Designed for girls ages 6–14, this camp takes place on Fairfield’s beautiful campus, featuring state‑of‑the‑art athletic facilities that create the perfect environment for learning, competing, and having fun. What makes this camp truly special is the staff’s commitment to teaching the game the right way, blending proven fundamentals, modern training methods, and an encouraging approach that helps each player grow technically, tactically, and mentally. From dynamic drills to small‑sided games, every session is designed to elevate skills, boost creativity, and inspire a deeper love for the sport. A note from Corey Holton, Associate Women's Head Coach, Fairfield University: “This isn’t just another camp, it’s a chance to see what the next level is really all about. Players train on a Division I campus, learning from a coaching staff that recruits and develops college athletes, alongside counselors who are currently playing at that level. Led by coaches with over 20 years of collegiate experience, the camp blends focused technical training with fun, competitive games. With a mix of individual ball work, small-sided games, and full-field play when possible, everything is designed to help players grow in confidence, sharpen their skills, and leave with a deeper understanding and love of the game.” Join us this summer at Fairfield University and take your game to the next level with top‑tier coaching, elite facilities, and the trusted Nike Soccer Camp experience!

name: Nike Girls Soccer Camp at University of Mount Saint Vincent -  (Aug. 3–7, 2026)
description: Experience an incredible week at the Nike Soccer Camp in the Bronx, hosted at the University of Mount Saint Vincent! Collaborate with Jason Weisberg and the Women's soccer coaching staff for an unforgettable experience soccer training camp. Our program integrates time-tested and innovative coaching techniques, ensuring each participant can elevate their soccer skills. Join us to elevate your game and advance to new heights in soccer excellence!

name: Nike Girls ID Camp at Oklahoma State University -  (July 25, 2026)
description: Join us at the Nike Girls ID Camp at Oklahoma State University, hosted on the university's world-class facilities in Stillwater, Oklahoma. The Elite College ID Camp will be conducted by head coach Colin Carmichael and associate head coach Justin Elkington. The coaching sessions and curriculum will be designed by the OSU coaches to challenge players with advanced technical and tactical components of the game. The camp is designed for advanced ODP, Club, High School and Junior College players and will be very competitive. If you want to test yourself against the best, this camp is for you. Among the schools who have attended the Elite College ID Camps in the past are TCU, Tulsa, Missouri, Oral Roberts, Sam Houston State, Little Rock, UTSA, Louisiana Tech, Missouri State, Central Oklahoma, SW Oklahoma State, Oklahoma City University, Oklahoma Wesleyan, Oklahoma Christian, Paris Junior College, Panhandle State, Eastfield College, Emporia State, NW Oklahoma State, Rogers State, University of the Ozarks, Rose State, Southern Nazarene, MACU, Pratt Junior College, Butler Junior College, Seminole State and Cowley College.

name: Nike Soccer Camp with Prospect Soccer Academy - Laguna Niguel -  (June 22–26, 2026)
description: Join us for another amazing summer at the Nike Soccer Camp with Prospect Soccer Academy in Laguna Niguel, led by Coach Harry Forrester. Open to boys and girls ages 6–14 of all ability levels, this camp provides an outstanding opportunity for players to develop their technical, tactical, and physical skills while enhancing their overall soccer IQ in a fun, supportive environment. Prospect Soccer Academy is Southern California’s premier development program, led by former professional players who run a full-time soccer academy in Orange County. With a proven track record of developing players at every level, the coaching staff brings elite playing experience and a modern, player-focused approach to each session. Conveniently located in Laguna Niguel, this camp is ideal for families across Orange County and surrounding communities seeking high-quality youth soccer training close to home. The curriculum blends proven fundamentals with innovative, game-based training to improve technical ability, decision-making, and confidence on the ball. Led by coaches who train players year-round, campers benefit from a consistent, high-level development model that emphasizes accountability, growth, and enjoyment of the game. Join us in Laguna Niguel for a fun and competitive week of soccer, build lasting friendships, and take your game to the next level. Hear from Co-Owner of Prospect Soccer Academy and Camp Director Harry Forrester: "Our camps are delivered by seasoned professional players and coaches who bring real game experience into every session. Built around a proven, development-first philosophy, we prioritize technical excellence through high-repetition training and game-realistic scenarios such as 1v1 and 2v2, helping players build confidence, decision-making, and creativity under pressure. Just as important is the environment we create, structured, supportive, and professionally led, where players are encouraged to take risks, learn from mistakes, and grow. Our goal is for every player to leave not only as a more complete footballer, but with greater confidence, resilience, and a genuine love for the game.” Prospect Soccer Academy will be hosting camps in multiple other locations Click here for more info

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Admiral Farragut Academy -  (June 1–5, 2026)
description: Join us for an exciting week of soccer this summer at the Nike Soccer Camp at Admiral Farragut Academy, led by Co‑Directors Luke Sheekey, Head Women’s Soccer Coach at Eckerd College, and Joe Ilett, Head Men’s Soccer Coach at Eckerd College. Both Luke and Joe are highly respected youth‑development coaches with extensive experience directing camps that blend modern coaching methodologies with a fun, competitive atmosphere. name: Nike Soccer Camp with Prospect Soccer Academy - Memphis -  (June 22–26, 2026)
description: Join us for an exciting summer at the Nike Soccer Camp with Prospect Soccer Academy in Collierville, TN, held at St. George’s Independent School. Led by Camp Director Chris Gardea and the Prospect Soccer Academy staff, this camp is open to boys and girls ages 6–14 of all ability levels and provides a high-quality training experience focused on technical development, tactical understanding, and overall soccer IQ in a fun and supportive environment. Prospect Soccer Academy is a premier development program led by former professional players who run a full-time academy dedicated to developing players at every stage of their soccer journey. With extensive playing and coaching experience, the staff delivers a high-energy, player-focused environment centered on confidence, growth, and long-term development. Set just outside Memphis in Collierville, TN, St. George’s Independent School offers outstanding soccer facilities, including well-maintained grass fields and a professional training environment ideal for player development. The campus provides a focused, safe, and high-quality setting for a full week of soccer training. The curriculum blends proven fundamentals with modern, game-based training designed to improve decision-making, technical ability, and performance under pressure. This camp is a great opportunity for young players in the Memphis area to learn, compete, and grow under experienced, passionate coaches while building confidence and a love for the game. Hear from Co-Owner of Prospect Soccer Academy and Camp Director Harry Forrester: "Our camps are delivered by seasoned professional players and coaches who bring real game experience into every session. Built around a proven, development-first philosophy, we prioritize technical excellence through high-repetition training and game-realistic scenarios such as 1v1 and 2v2, helping players build confidence, decision-making, and creativity under pressure. Just as important is the environment we create, structured, supportive, and professionally led, where players are encouraged to take risks, learn from mistakes, and grow. Our goal is for every player to leave not only as a more complete footballer, but with greater confidence, resilience, and a genuine love for the game.”

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Sofive Covina -  (July 20–24, 2026)
description: Experience elite training this summer at the Nike Soccer Camp at Sofive Covina, powered by the regionally respected player‑development expertise of Coach Chris Bonawandt and his renowned Los Angeles Soccer Camp organization. Known across the Los Angeles area for producing confident, technically skilled players and running some of the region’s most trusted youth soccer camps, Coach Chris brings his proven training model to Rancho Cucamonga for an unforgettable week of growth and excitement. Hosted at Sofive Covina, a state-of-the-art soccer facility built for fast-paced play and top-tier instruction, this camp offers the perfect environment for players to sharpen their skills and take their game to the next level. Open to boys and girls ages 6–16 of all experience levels, the program features a low coach-to-camper ratio, ensuring every athlete receives personalized feedback, quality repetitions, and individual attention. Campers will develop new techniques, strengthen fundamentals, improve decision-making, and build confidence through dynamic drills and competitive play. “At LA Soccer Camps, our goal is simple, we want kids from all backgrounds to have fun, play the game, and continue developing their skills. Each week we focus on one core fundamental each day, like dribbling, turning, passing, receiving, and shooting, so players can really lock in and build confidence. More than anything, we want kids to leave camp smiling, proud of what they learned, and excited to come back the next day.” - Chris Bonawandt, Camp Director

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Sofive Elkins Park - Day Camp (June 29–July 3, 2026)
description: Experience an action‑packed week of world‑class soccer training at the Nike Soccer Camp at Sofive Elkins Park in Elkins Park, Pennsylvania — led by the internationally respected Gold & Gray Soccer Academy. Founded by professional footballers David Gold and Ross Gray, Gold & Gray has earned a reputation as one of Scotland’s premier development academies, trusted by MLS athletes and European professionals for cultivating top-tier youth talent. Open to boys and girls ages 6–16 of all experience levels, this camp delivers an elite training environment inside a modern, state-of-the-art Sofive facility. Players benefit from a low coach‑to‑camper ratio and receive personalized guidance from UEFA‑licensed coaches who have trained youth athletes from renowned clubs including Celtic, Rangers, Hearts, and Hibs. Throughout the week, campers sharpen their technical skills, improve their speed of play and decision-making, and develop confidence through high‑energy sessions that blend professionalism with fun. It’s a chance to train like the pros, push your game forward, and experience the intensity and excitement of a true academy-style environment. Whether you're aiming to elevate your game, build a stronger foundation, or simply enjoy an unforgettable week of soccer, this Nike Soccer Camp is the perfect opportunity to take your skills to the next level.

Campers focus on all aspects of the game including refining fundamental skills and positional work through challenging exercises and scrimmages. A Step Ahead (ASA) Nike Soccer Camps are designed for a player looking to improve their game and soccer IQ. name: Nike Soccer Camp with Soccer IQ Academy in Colorado Springs -  (July 13–17, 2026)
description: The Nike Soccer Camp with Soccer IQ Academy in Colorado Springs delivers a high‑energy, transformational training experience powered by the state’s top youth development program. Soccer IQ Academy, known for producing numerous collegiate and professional players, brings its world‑class methodology to Cottonwood Creek Park, giving athletes the perfect opportunity to sharpen their skills, elevate their soccer IQ, and head into the fall season with confidence. This “Complete Player” camp blends technical training with position‑specific work to build smart, versatile athletes. Players sharpen defending, midfield play, and attacking skills while mastering finishing in realistic game situations. Daily training boosts footwork, passing, ball control, speed, and agility, all guided by SIQ’s modern, IQ‑driven curriculum. Through small‑sided games and high‑pressure scenarios, athletes elevate their decision‑making, vision, creativity, and confidence in every phase of play. The camp is led by Soccer IQ Academy’s elite coaching staff, using a Barcelona‑influenced curriculum developed by a USSF A‑licensed coach. Each SIQ coach brings collegiate or professional experience, holds official coaching certifications, and completes SafeSport training, background checks, and specialized SIQ methodology training, ensuring players receive instruction held to the highest standard. Hear from Camp Director Yura Kulikov: "At Soccer IQ Academy, we don’t just train players to be better on the ball, we teach them how to think the game. Every session is built around real game situations so players develop decision-making, awareness, and confidence, all while having fun and building a true love for soccer Our camps consistently receive strong feedback from both players and parents because of the balance we create between development and enjoyment. Many players return year after year, and we pride ourselves on creating an environment where kids are excited to come back every day.We also keep coach-to-player interaction high, ensuring every player is seen, coached, and supported throughout the camp." Train Smarter, Play Faster and Become the Complete Player with SIQ Academy and Nike Soccer Camps!

description: This Nike Soccer Camp with Soccer IQ Academy brings SIQ Academy’s proven development model to Westlands Park in Greenwood Village. name: Nike Soccer Camp at Texas Woman's University -  (June 8–12, 2026)
description: Join us at the Nike Soccer Camp at Texas Woman’s University in Denton, Texas, where young athletes can experience top-tier coaching and skill development in a dynamic and fun environment. Whether you're just starting out or looking to hone specific skills, our expert coaches will guide you through drills and strategies to improve your game. Our camp is designed for players of all skill levels (ages 6-16), offering both day and half-day options to suit your summer schedule. Make friends and memories that last a lifetime! Plus, campers can beat the heat with a refreshing swim in the TWU pool! Hear from Camp Director Babak Abouzar: "Our camp combines enthusiastic college-level coaching with a fun, competitive atmosphere where players are pushed to improve, build confidence, and develop a genuine love for the game. With the guidance of the TWU soccer staff and assistance of energetic high level collegiate soccer players our camp is designed to build better players, stronger teammates, and a lifelong passion for soccer."

name: Nike Soccer Camp with Soccer SideKicks in Brookhaven - Day Camp (June 15–19, 2026)
description: This Nike Soccer Camp with SoccerSidekicks delivers a truly one‑of‑a‑kind soccer experience where fun, discovery, and individual growth come first. As the national leader in early childhood soccer development, SoccerSidekicks owns the 4–8 age space, creating an environment where kids fall in love with the game through imaginative activities, movement‑based learning, and age‑appropriate skill development. No other camp is designed exclusively for young players, offering a safe, energetic, and genuinely child‑friendly setting led by best‑in‑class youth development experts who understand how kids learn best—this camp is built for kids! Led by Camp Director Ben Clark and a team of enthusiastic, kid‑first coaches, campers build confidence, coordination, and essential soccer skills through creative games and small‑sided play that keep excitement high and smiles on faces. For older players ages 9–12, the camp features an extended curriculum that builds on technical foundations, introduces more advanced concepts, and helps prepare players for higher levels of play, all while maintaining the fun, supportive SoccerSidekicks culture. Whether it’s a child’s very first kick or the next step in their soccer journey, every aspect of the camp is thoughtfully designed to help players grow, thrive, and leave the field eager to come back. Join us this summer at Georgian Hills Park for a joy‑filled, development‑centered soccer experience where every player learns, grows, and leaves with newfound confidence and excitement for the beautiful game!

name: Nike Soccer Camp  with FourSoccer - Washington DC - Day Camp (June 22–26, 2026)
description: FourSoccer x Nike Soccer Camps is expanding this summer with an exciting new home base at the University of the District of Columbia (UDC), featuring premier fields, elite athletic facilities, and an unbeatable camp atmosphere. This camp has SOLD OUT for the past three years, so families are encouraged to register early to secure their spot. Led by Camp Director Ben Mortimer, Assistant Men’s Soccer Coach at UDC, this high‑energy program blends modern training methods, elite technical instruction, and nonstop fun to help every player elevate their game. Whether your camper is brand‑new to the sport or ready to push toward the next level, our professional coaching curriculum is built to deliver real development in a supportive, motivating environment. What Campers Will Experience Morning On‑Field Training: Master technical skills and game‑speed movement on a full‑size NCAA‑standard soccer field, perfect for high‑quality, professional‑level instruction. Indoor Skills & Cool‑Down Sessions: Beat the heat inside UDC’s air‑conditioned full‑size arena for lunch, footskill challenges, and exciting small‑sided competitions. Afternoon Splash & Recovery: Recharge with fun, supervised sessions inside the Olympic‑size swimming pool, ideal for recovery, confidence, and summer fun. FIFA World Cup 2026 Big‑Screen Zone: Watch matches, highlights, and unforgettable moments all summer long on our camp big‑screen setup, creating a one‑of‑a‑kind soccer environment. A premier Nike Soccer Camp experience in the Nation’s Capital—trusted, proven, and built for real development! The final TWO weeks of camp in August will take place at the nearby Horace Mann ES, our trusted longtime home that continues to deliver an energetic, community‑driven environment we’re proud to bring into our 2026 programming: Horace Mann ES

name: Nike Soccer Camp at University of Puget Sound - Day Camp (July 27–30, 2026)
description: Nike Soccer Camps is thrilled to offer a new program at University of Puget Sound in Tacoma, WA in Summer 2026! Register today and enjoy elite-level training while making memories to last a lifetime. The camp offers a unique opportunity to train under the direction of college coaches and current and former collegiate athletes who serve as counselors. The camp is open to athletes ages 10-17. Overnight Camp Our overnight camp at Puget Sound offers an immersive, on-campus experience where campers reside in the dormitories in adjacent rooms to the camp staff while training during the daytime hours. The tuition includes all training, lodging, meals, fun evening activities, as well as college recruiting seminars on Tuesday evening (parents are encouraged to attend the seminars!). Day Camp (9:00am – 4:00pm) Nike Soccer Camps also offers a summer day camp program for athletes who do not wish to stay overnight. This program runs 9:00am-4:00pm each day and includes daytime training only. Campers can bring their own lunch or purchase on campus. Athletic Facilities Campers train at the East Athletic Field on campus at University of Puget Sound for the duration of the camp. East Field is a grass pitch just a short walk from the dormitories and dining hall. Nike Sports Camp Experience At University of Puget Sound, Nike Sports Camps offers a unique experience with many sports (Baseball, Cross Country, Softball, Swim, Tennis, and Track & Field) operating simultaneously. During the day, the athletes receive sport-specific coaching within their sport focus. In the evening, overnight campers across all sports come together for a special camp-wide experience which includes fun field games, educational seminars, and more. The Nike Soccer Camp at University of Puget Sound is open to any and all entrants and limited only by number, age and gender. Athletic facilities and coaches are subject to change. The camp is not owned, sponsored, controlled or endorsed by University of Puget Sound.
